message:
feat(daemon): add metrics polling infrastructure

Add MetricsPoller to periodically collect metrics from running Firecracker
VMs and send them to dashboard via MetricsSink interface. Collects network
and disk I/O metrics from Firecracker API.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,24 @@
+package daemon
+
+import (
+	"testing"
+	"time"
+)
+
+func TestMetricsPoller_StartsAndStops(t *testing.T) {
+	poller := NewMetricsPoller(nil, nil, 100*time.Millisecond)
+
+	poller.Start()
+	time.Sleep(50 * time.Millisecond)
+
+	if !poller.Running() {
+		t.Error("expected poller to be running")
+	}
+
+	poller.Stop()
+	time.Sleep(50 * time.Millisecond)
+
+	if poller.Running() {
+		t.Error("expected poller to be stopped")
+	}
+}
